message:
fix(codegen): fix dispatch table mode return types and unused variable warnings

- Add helper functions for emitting return statements that handle
  dispatch_mode correctly (emitReturnException, emitReturnValue,
  emitReturnValueFmt)
- Wrap all return statements in block functions with BlockResult union
  (.return_value, .exception, .return_undef)
- Fix unused variable warnings in block functions using std.debug.assert()
  instead of discards to avoid "pointless discard" errors
- Add self-assignment for mutable variables (sp, for_of_depth) to prevent
  "never mutated" warnings
- Detect dispatch_mode early (before emitSignature) so this_val discard
  is skipped when it will be used in BlockContext
- All benchmarks pass (path_trace, fib, loop, prime_factors, mandelbrot)
